Legacy code analysis — phoenixcode.ai
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<Model>
  <!--SCAN-->
  <Command Name="scan" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ScanCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ScanSettings">
    <Description>Scan a project and build the code graph</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="DIR" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output directory (default: 
./phoenixcode-output)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to the project directory to analyze</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="type" Value="TYPE" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Stack type: delphi, angular, dotnet</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--ACTIVATE-->
  <Command Name="activate" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ActivateCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ActivateSettings">
    <Description>Activate a license with a PX-XXXX key</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="key" Value="KEY" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>License key (format: PX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="type" Value="TYPE" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Stack type to analyze: delphi, angular, dotnet 
(optional)</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--INFO-->
  <Command Name="info" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.InfoCommand" 
Settings="Spectre.Console.Cli.EmptyCommandSettings">
    <Description>Show license information and usage summary</Description>
  </Command>
  <!--ANALYZE-->
  <Command Name="analyze" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.AnalyzeCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.AnalyzeSettings">
    <Description>Analyze code with AI and extract business rules</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="extract-rules" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Extract business rules with AI (default: 
true)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="scan-result" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to previous scan output directory (contains 
graph.db)</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--REPORT-->
  <Command Name="report" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ReportCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ReportSettings">
    <Description>Generate migration reports (DOCX, HTML, CSV, 
JSON)</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="FORMATS" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Comma-separated report formats: docx,html,csv,json 
(default: docx,html)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="DIR" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output directory (default: 
./phoenixcode-reports)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="scan-result" Value="PATH" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to previous scan output directory (contains 
graph.db)</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--RUN-->
  <Command Name="run" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.RunCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.RunSettings">
    <Description>Full pipeline: scan + analyze + report in a single 
step</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="db" Value="DIR" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Paradox database directory (Delphi only)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="extract-rules" Value="NULL" Required="false" 
Kind="flag" ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Extract business rules with AI (default: 
true)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="format" Value="FORMATS" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Comma-separated report formats: docx,html,csv,json 
(default: docx,html)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="o" Long="output" Value="DIR" Required="false" Kind="scalar"
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Output directory (default: 
./phoenixcode-output)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="path" Value="PATH" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Path to the project directory to analyze</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="type" Value="TYPE" Required="false" Kind="scalar" 
ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Stack type: delphi, angular, dotnet</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
  <!--CONFIG-->
  <Command Name="config" IsBranch="false" 
ClrType="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ConfigCommand" 
Settings="PhoenixCode.Lens.Cli.Commands.ConfigSettings">
    <Description>Manage persistent configuration 
(~/.phoenixcode/config.json)</Description>
    <Parameters>
      <Option Short="" Long="set" Value="KEY=VALUE" Required="false" 
Kind="scalar" ClrType="System.String">
        <Description>Save a configuration value (e.g., --set 
model=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929)</Description>
      </Option>
      <Option Short="" Long="show" Value="NULL" Required="false" Kind="flag" 
ClrType="System.Boolean">
        <Description>Show current configuration</Description>
      </Option>
    </Parameters>
  </Command>
</Model>

install.stdout:

Tool 'phoenixcode.lens' (version '1.3.0') was successfully installed.
